summary: Completed testing of Code Red Initiatives v6 - Backend Refactoring & Reporting Dashboard. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright including new Reporting Dashboard with recharts.
passed_tests: API Root Health Check - Returns v4.0.0 - SUCCESS
Login with admin@test.com/password123 - SUCCESS
Login with invalid credentials returns 401 - SUCCESS
Auth /me endpoint returns current user - SUCCESS
Dashboard Stats API returns all required fields - SUCCESS
Dashboard Stats values are valid integers - SUCCESS
Pipeline API returns 4 status columns - SUCCESS
Pipeline initiatives have nested projects - SUCCESS
Pipeline config endpoint returns valid statuses - SUCCESS
Business Outcomes Tree API returns 3-level hierarchy - SUCCESS
Reports Pipeline endpoint returns correct structure - SUCCESS
Reports Business Outcomes endpoint returns correct structure - SUCCESS
Reports Trends endpoint returns KPI trends with history - SUCCESS
Reports Pipeline has all 4 initiative statuses - SUCCESS
Strategic Initiatives endpoint working (modular backend) - SUCCESS
Projects endpoint working (modular backend) - SUCCESS
Business Outcomes Categories endpoint working - SUCCESS
KPIs endpoint working - SUCCESS
Frontend: Login form with data-testid selectors - SUCCESS
Frontend: Navigation shows Code Red Pipeline, Business Outcomes, Reporting - SUCCESS
Frontend: Dashboard shows 4 stat cards (5 Initiatives, 4 Projects, 3 Outcomes, 11 KPIs) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Pipeline shows 4 columns (Not Started, Discovery, Frame, Work In Progress) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Add Initiative button visible - SUCCESS
Frontend: Business Outcomes page shows tree view (ETO 46%, Quality 36%, PDSL 47%) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Reporting Dashboard loads with recharts (10 chart components) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Reporting shows Initiative Status Distribution pie chart - SUCCESS
Frontend: Reporting shows Project Status Distribution bar chart - SUCCESS
Frontend: Reporting shows KPI Performance Overview pie chart - SUCCESS
Frontend: Reporting shows Progress by Business Outcome Category bar chart - SUCCESS
Frontend: Reporting shows KPI Trends Over Time line charts - SUCCESS
Frontend: Reporting shows Business Outcome Summary table - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: Backend modular structure is well-organized: routes/, models/, utils/ separation
All API endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id field
Charts use recharts library correctly with responsive containers
Good use of data-testid attributes throughout for testing
seed_data_creation: Seed endpoint creates: 3 categories (ETO, Quality, PDSL), 7 sub-outcomes, 11 KPIs with weekly history data, 5 strategic initiatives, 4 projects with milestones
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend was refactored from monolithic server.py into modular structure (routes/, models/, utils/). All API endpoints work correctly. New Reporting Dashboard added with charts using recharts library. Charts include: Initiative Status Distribution (pie), Project Status Distribution (bar), KPI Performance Overview (pie), Progress by Business Outcome Category (bar), KPI Trends Over Time (line), and Business Outcome Summary table.

reporting_dashboard_charts.initiative_status_distribution: Pie chart - Not Started(3), Discovery(1), Frame(0), WIP(1)
reporting_dashboard_charts.project_status_distribution: Bar chart - Not Started(1), In Progress(3), Completed(0), On Hold(0)
reporting_dashboard_charts.kpi_performance_overview: Pie chart - On Track(0), At Risk(9), Off Track(2)
reporting_dashboard_charts.kpi_trends_over_time: Line charts for 6 KPIs with weekly historical data
reporting_dashboard_charts.business_outcome_summary: Table with Category, Sub-Outcomes, KPIs, Avg Progress, On Track, At Risk, Off Track columns
